title: Analyses of human cancer driver genes uncovers evolutionarily conserved RNA structural elements involved in posttranscriptional control - associated datasets
author: Van S. Tompkins
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
These datasets include raw data output and associated files from ScanFold and CMbuilder analyses of human cancer driver gene mRNA. ScanFold was used to predict RNA regions of unusual thermodynamic stability, and CMbuilder was used to evaluate covariation of the predicted structures in those regions. Please view the file  README_general_description_Zenodo_files.txt  for brief descriptions of the content. 

 These data are associated with the manuscript entitled  Analyses of human cancer driver genes uncovers evolutionarily conserved RNA structural elements involved in posttranscriptional control . The manuscript has currently been submitted for review in PLOS ONE.
